title: mussaenda sabahensis
intro: Mussaenda sabahensis, also known as the Bunga Raya plant, is a flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Southeast Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Mussaenda sabahensis include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and boost the immune system. The plant is commonly used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, to treat various ailments, including coughs, colds, and skin conditions.
